text: Kal raat papa ne mere shaadi ke liye ek rishta dikhaya aur jab maine thoda sa bhi inkaar kiya toh unhone saaf keh diya ki khandaan ki izzat unke haath mein hai. Main janti hoon ki main unki umeedon par kabhi khari nahi utar paungi, par unka BP aur 'log kya kahenge' ki chinta dekh kar maine chup-chaap apna muh band kar liya. Ghar ki shanti aur papa ka maan bachane ke liye maine bol diya ki main milne ke liye tayar hoon.

Kal raat ki bahas tab khatam hui jab papa ne mere career aur doston ko lekar saaf ultimatum de diya ki unhe hamari maryada ke bahar kuch bhi manzoor nahi. Mera man tha ki main apna sach unhe bataun, par joint family mein rehkar unke authoritarian control se darr lagta hai ki parivaar bikhar jayega. Unka ashirwad khone ke darr se maine unse maafi maang li aur wahi sab karne ko haan keh diya jo wo chahte hain.

Bapu ne kal raat kaha ki unhone mere liye gaon mein ek zameen dekh li hai taaki main shehar se wapas aakar settle ho jaun aur 'ek achha beta' ban kar dikhaun. Main yahan urban isolation mein apni asli pehchan chhupa kar jee raha hoon, par unhe palat kar jawab dena humare sanskaron ke khilaf hai. Unka sar samaj mein uncha rahe, isliye maine apne saare ehsaas daba diye aur unki baat mein haan mila di.

Mera man tha ki main unhe batati ki main kisi se pyar karti hoon, par kal raat papa ne jab 'badnaam beti' aur 'khandaan ka naam mitti mein' milne ki baat ki toh meri himmat toot gayi. Unke authoritarian control ke samne main apna haq nahi maang saki kyunki main nahi chahti ki meri wajah se mummy ko unke taane sunne padein. Rishton ki dor bachane ke liye maine aaj subah unke bataye huye rishtedaar ke yahan jane ke liye naye kapde nikaal liye.

Kal raat ki anban ke baad se papa ne mujhse seedhe munh baat nahi ki kyunki maine unke bataye huye rishtey ke liye thoda sawal kiya tha. Main jaanti hoon ki agar main apni reality batati toh joint family mein kalesh ho jata aur bado ka lihaz khatam ho jata. Unki izzat aur buzurgon ke maan-samman ke liye maine apna gussa pee liya aur unhe wada kiya ki main unke har faisle ka samman karunga.
